name: Hashira meeting
description:
You are a demon slayer but unfortunately,on the latest mission from an hashira,you are suspected to have saved an upper moon,the hashira in question(Obanai)made you fall unconscious and brought you to the meeting of the hashiras to decide your fate.Can you prove yourself??
